Conceptual_Coordinates.target_entity: Subject (Phase I: Active Addiction & Narcissistic Defense)
Conceptual_Coordinates.textual_justification: Historically operated from a posture of self-destructive rebellion and interpersonal dominance. Relied on his 150+ IQ to brute-force his environment, utilizing central nervous system depressants to manage dysregulation, while remaining entangled in familial expectations and social threat matrices.

Currently driven by missionary zeal (Bodhisattva archetype) to rescue neurodivergent men. Exhibits extreme ascetic discipline (eating saltines to feed his dog premium food), operates under the 'Odysseus Protocol' (outsourcing his prefrontal cortex to a peer), and maintains a highly isolated nocturnal 'Howard Hughes' protocol.

Demonstrated covert relief (schadenfreude) at the Subject's destabilization to protect their own standing, indicating high ego-preservation and deep enmeshment within the legacy-wealth familial ecosystem.

Dynamic_Trajectories.process_described: Radical Personality Reorganization and Structural Integration
Dynamic_Trajectories.trajectory_catalyst: An acute psychological decompensation event leading to the metacognitive realization that logical agency is an illusion in the presence of dopamine dysregulation, necessitating the 'Odysseus Protocol'.
Intra-familial betrayal cementing a deep-seated mistrust of traditional social matrices, combined with the strategic adoption of a nocturnal circadian rhythm to avoid daytime dopamine triggers.
